race.comment: SPACE ACADEMY (4) sat handy before putting his rivals away last start over the mile at Belmont in a strong victory. This looks a very suitable race on what he did there and he's already ticked the distance box. Looks to be building nicely this time in work and he can go on with the job. GREAT DEAL (3) was too strong from the front over 1500m here last time out, running away to win by 1.6L. Out to this trip for the first time, but if he can dictate proceedings from the front, he'll be tough to run down. SKY GOD (1) got the job done here last time out and can repeat the dose. VENUS KING (5) can improve on his recent efforts in this suitable event.
